segments.text: Today, you have come here to worship Me as Shri Ganesha.
We had been singing the praise of Shri Ganesha before every puja and we've such tremendous
respect for Shri Ganesh because we found out that unless and until Shri Ganesha who
is the symbol of our innocence, it's not awakened within us.
We cannot enter into
The Kingdom Of God and even to stay there
And enjoy the blessings of Shri Ganesha
we have
To have
Our Innocence fully blossoming
So we praise Him
and he is very easily praised.
And whatever we might have done wrong
before coming to Sahaja Yoga,
He completely forgives
because He's the eternal child!
You've seen children
when you slap them sometimes get angry with them
they forget it
They only remember their love
and not what they have suffered at your hands.
Till the grow up,
They do no memory of bad things done to them
From very beginning a child is born into mother
He doesn't know that he has gone through
Gradually the memory starts working
And he start restoring thing within himself
But in the beginning only he remembers what nice things have happened to him.
So we always like to ponder about our childhood,
What we enjoyed when I was a child
but as you start growing up
You will remember all of your miseries
and all the tribulations that had to go through
All the audience through which we have passed,
We tried to magnify it.
In childhood children only remember
The people who loved them
And not those that hurted
They don't want perhaps
It looks like this
But when they grow up
Only try and remember
Those people who harmed
Or troubled
That's how they make themselves miserable
But the principle of Ganesha is extremely subtle, it's the subtlest-of-subtle and
It exists in everything.
That It exists In a matter –in The form Of vibrations
There Is no Matter which is without Vibrations
It has vibrations which are seen even in the atoms and also in the molecules of all matter
that is existing.
So Shri Ganesha was first one who established in a matter as well, As result we can see
He exists In The Sun, He ExistsInThe Moon, He ExistInThe Whole Universe , In The Whole
creation and it continues to exist in human beings also.
Only the humans have capacity, some or other cover up your innocence otherwise animals
are innocent.
Human being's freedom if they want can cover their innocence then shut down the doors
of Shri Ganesha and say that He does not exist. They can cloud it,
And this is why we find among human beings
That they are doing so many horrible things
avoiding the existence
Of Shri Ganesh
But he acts
in a way
that he shows natural results of our wrongdoings, like if you do things which are not pleasing
to Shri Ganesha. He goes upto a point – forgives-you–upto
a point and then he starts emerging out as diseases,
physical diseases.
And in women it becomes mental disease
also
It can create problems
In the nature
The natural catastrophes are
Also only
The curse of Shri Kanisha
When people start doing wrong things
behaving in a wrong manner, collectively then the natural catastrophe has come to teach
them lesson.
So is his essence though he exists and everything also that He had capacity
to assert His will
To bring forth the destruction of whole world.
We have Shri Ganesha's idea as a minute thing
we think he can go on little mouse
so must be very minute
He is as minute, and great
He surpasses all the deities because of His wisdom.
he is a giver or wisdom, gives us wisdom
makes as learn
He's our guru in that respect
Mahaguru
Because it teaches how we should behave
If you try to surpass him and try to misbehave
Even mother won't support
Because she knows that those who surpass Shri Ganesha are also the people
Who will never respect a Mother.
So he is epitome of respect for Mother, epitome!
He does not know any other Gods
and he doesn't know Sadashiva or anybody else
but only respects The Mother
So, He's the one who is power of devotion and complete surrender to Mother.
And that why he was most powerful deity among all deities – nobody can surpass Him in
His powers!
We have understand as children are growing Shri Ganesha starts growing within them also
But as they are human beings,
They can somehow or other try to overpower Shri Ganesha.
So it's the duty of parents who're Sahaja Yogis
To see that
Look after their children in a way
In detached ways
And you'll know that Shri Ganesa is settled
The first sign
Of Shri Ganesh and his child
Is wisdom
If your son isn't wise
If he is troublesome, if it does not know how to behave then that shows that the Shri Ganesha
Is being attacked by him and these days in modern times as it is children are very much
under attack. In a sense they're under attack
And It's Very Difficult for people To make A fine line
As How far to go with Children
and how far not to go.
Today's lecture would be more concerning
about, How Far To Go With Shri Ganesha
as far children are concerned
because that is a very important point
Because He Is the giver of wisdom
So parents must understand
That if he is The giver Of Wisdom
there should be wisdom within me
And If I have the wisdom then
I have the balance and don't lose tempers with children, but try to correct them in such
a manner that they get corrected.
On contrary if you are very harsh towards your child then he might react or go astray
or you try to restrict them too much, then also they will behave in the same manner.
So one thing is be taught by your own children as Shri Ganesha himself does that respect
Your Mother – Your mother means Holy Mother and Your Own Mother!
That it's very important if The Father doesn't make a child respect the Mother
The child can never be all right, because the authority comes from the father no doubt.
But mother must respected but for that it is very important
That Mother must respect her Father
So in presence of children if you start fighting with each other
Misbehaving and talking in a manner
that is not proper, also will have a very bad effect on the Ganesha Tattva of the child.
This upbringing in Sahaja Yoga because by God's grace you all have got realized children
so You must know how far to go with your children
To make them wiser
moral, to be righteous. First thing is that you should try
preserve their wisdom if they say something wise
You must appreciate but
They Should not also Say out of Place Out Of Grace
So the misbehavior
Is Also Not To Be Tolerated In The Sense
That Whatever Is Wisdom Within
Has To Be Expressed Outside As Light
Now We Go Further With It
to see how far Shri Ganesha acts.
As I said, in the subtlest of subtlest exists but you have to awaken Him – for example
You've seen that water which is vibrated means what?
Vibrated meaning the Ganesh Tattva being enlightened by that Water so when That Water
goes into your stomach or in to you eyes,
wherever want put it,
It acts.
Acts is a way that
it excites Isha Ganesh Tattva
Into anything
That You've Puted
Now we have seen
We got miracles of agriculture
To begin with
Miracles Of Agriculture
Such
That people are amazed
But
Its very simple
Once you start exciting the Ganesha principle into
The seed, it becomes ten times sometimes hundred
Times. Even Mother Earth which we think to be something
Dead can be vibrated. Supposing
You Sahaja Yogis walk bare feet on
ground, the Mother Earth gets vibrated.
Such mother earth will act on trees and grass or flowers of everything as it is Sahaja Yogis
have been telling Me that in their Ashrams all the flowers grow are out-of size and
very fragrant like daisies never had fragrance at London or England – never!
Now, the daisies' size was so small it has become so big and you see them everywhere
– so fragrant.
And It is a miracle!
The first time when I told somebody that the daisies are fragrant they couldn't
believe it…
…and then They saw their fragrance they were surprised.
In same way Ganesha Tattva understands things, organizes works out if it is awakened
If it is not, It's sleeping. Then He does not.
So it acts –it works out
like a little seed when its sprouts
at the tip of that seed there Is
A Little Cell which has got the Ganesha Tattva
Which is being awakened
so IT knows how to go down
How To Go Round The Stone
and HOW TO IMPADE ITSELF
And HOW TO REACH THE SOURCE OF WATER
But IT HAS ONLY THE SENSE
HOW FAR TO GO TO EXIST
How far to go, to nourish yourself on a very material plane?
how do allow the tree grow.
But this Ganesha Tattva starts becoming
Very-very subtle and subtlest at
The point of Agnya Chakra
At that time of Agnya Chakra it understands
That It has now the spiritual dimension
The same Ganesha Tattva which acted in a small little tip of root now acts for the spiritual
thing.
That's why people close their eyes when they meditate, because don't want to see
anything else but still they want Shri Ganesa just act on this meditative process
This process of meditation, when we close our eyes acts but if you see
If somebody is sleeping and he's dreaming
You'll there will be the eyes
Will all time moving
These Ganesha Tattva are now acted by your attention
If you have an attention which is all the time going from this place to that place,
To That Place ,To That Place then it's affected.
Specially in case when we start looking at men and women
All The Time Then also our Ganesha Tattva gets very much destroyed
Such people are difficult for rising In their Ascent
because Agnya itself goes out.
Then this Ganesha Tattva can also be reduced if you are very materialistic,
all that worried about your things like
You have something in the house, you're worried and looking at everything
All time trying to correct it
And always worried of matter
then also these Ganesa tattvas
Can get lost
Because we've been worrying for so long
things, like we are going to the shop and you're seeing everything – what is there?
What should I buy?, Like that also if do too much it will be.
But supposing your buying something out of beauty for a beautiful thing ,you want
to do something, to please others.
You are doing it make other very happy then acts the other way round and increases your
asset but if is done only create a kind of joy for others sharing beauty whatever you
have bought or taken.
But supposing you are buying anything for making others feel jealous, that also I have
recently learnt there is a capacity like this to buy something and make people jealous.
Not just to make somebody happy!
If they're the kind of person who buys things only because it makes them feel jealous
then their Ganesha Tattva can be destroyed too.
What you should buy, anything. You should make a beautiful house
When somebody comes to your house he should say oh what nice thing we have seen
Not attachment with the things but
Attachment of how people feel and they feel nice and relaxed
They are Shri Ganesha within them which is beauty
when this feeling comes in then
you should say, there's Ganesha Tathog. And it is a very motherly feeling – like
your Mother always wants to give sweet things for Her children and beautiful things
To her Children in the same way that you have that Vatsalya as its called
It' s The Feeling of the Mother For the Child
That subtle feeling You've got
People come into My house
Now see how they are happy
They're enjoying this
and they are appreciating it.
In that way you also satisfy a very great Ganesha principle
is,that You have taken note of the artists
though the artist's are created
there all beautiful things out off matter
through the Swadhisthana
but without swadishthana being governed by Shri Ganesa
It cannot be beautiful
These days as we see
artists are taking to all sorts of grotesque things and very immoral things.
And these things have no eternal value – today people will buy them, tomorrow they'll
throw away!
Only the thing which has got a subtle Ganesha principle in it acting that makes you soothe
So Shri Ganesha establishes within you the higher self, so that baser Self which enjoys
all baser things of lives are being cut down sometimes completely destroyed by Shri
Ganesh.
I'll give an example of Mona Lisa – if You see Mona Lisa…I mean she cannot be
She cannot win any beauty contest, I think.
Her face is very serene
Very motherly
Very pure
And why it that she's eternally so much appreciated?
The reason there Ganesha principle in her
and the story about this one
This lady had lost her child
And she would never smile, She will not cry.
One little child was brought to Her and when She saw the child then the smile that came
on her face of That love for The Child is being depicted by this great artist
—and thats why people are appreciating it—
you have seen in the West though
People don't show much interest
In mother-child relationships
Anywhere You go
Is a Mother & Child theme
They'll show you a photograph, this is mother and child.
This Christ's Mother & Child – when the Christ was brought down
The Mother Is There!
they have to be Mother And A Child principle acting
Otherwise that picture
It not regarded as something great
Or You Have To Have Actually Christ
Who Is The Ganesha Principle Himself
I haven't seen any
Picture As Such Of Those Days
Where These Principles Are Not There
Even Picasso has used it, even people who have been quite modern had to use this principle
To popularize but some people have used to popularise not the Ganesh Principle just
Anti-Ganesha Principles.
All such things are vanished into thin air and I see now gradually its all going down
And Down and Down and Down despite that fact People have lost their morals still
They would like to have Rembrandt, they'll have to have Leonardo da Vinci.
There will be such artists who've done Mother and Child – it's very surprising!
Even I went to Austria this time
And said what statue is yours?
We got beautiful Medunandacha
So these principles are the most pleasing principle
It' s a most pleasing principle for human beings
To see their children
to play with them, to enjoy their company.
Why? Because it has that sweetness of a child
which really I should say tickles joy within you
when see your child
Immediately the face becomes different
and have told You
That i've seen even crocodile cracking her eggs
I mean they showed in film
And if would had been seeing eyes
Of crocodiles at time
How carefully she was cracking
So beautiful Her eyes were, full of such love pouring out of Her eyes.
You can't believe these are the eyes
Of same crocodile and so slowly She's cracking with her mouth
all The eggs
And little,little crocodiles coming up
Then she brings them on shore
and washes Them in the Mouth
All that time
So carefully like a bathroom
she uses her mouth, you see.
You should how animals also act to their children but when
become sort of modern so called your actions are very funny
there up people who killing children they're people
were abusing children I mean it is worse than rakshasas
even rakshasa have not done pishachyas
has had no done the ganahs are surprised what
these new creatures have come up from where? That they have no love for their children,
that They can kill Their Children, murder Them and break Their hands. These are
Their own children! If The do this to There own children what will
the Do To other children? So Love For Your Child has
be absolutely important but You should not as Sahaja Yogis
have only attachment for your child, first thing.
And the second is you must know how to give a complete margin
To Your love
The margin Is benevolence
It's it benevolent For my Child?
Am I spoiling My Child
am i too much encouraging My Child
or playing into hands of My Child
Or I'm managing the Child alright
Because in childhood, the father and mother have to manage their children.
They've got to tell them that they should be obedient
And listen to parents
But these days kids are not obedient
They're not
because
there is defined
The parent among themselves
Are not obedient with each other
Also they find a society such
That where
Children go on
Pestering the parents
So it also becomes like this
It doesn't matter
You are Sahaja Yogis
So you should bring up your children, who should be obedient and wise with the same
love that a crocodile has for her little crocodiles.
Now when we come to the subtler side of Ganesha Tattva it expresses in our eyes
When I see some things,
it is a joy-giving thing.
Just the joy giving
and if i want to buy something
then all right
can be for certain person
he will like
because they know what
so that's why
or else

my family
think the same

They can't travel through Switzerland or leave alone England so we are thinking

In India it's not a case very much with the simple people to have jealousies – only
new materialistic people who develop this habit of jealousy but otherwise they will

How there are like you were singing songs about Sahaja Yoga in Pune actually we

They where the master's of drama and play a known artist in India then they said that
when we went to see their plays also at Pune if You remember so offered Me Mother

I said, it's very difficult because you'll be so far away
– no-no! We will come."
The whole night they travelled and the whole day practically

They finished their drama about say three o' clock or four o'clock
And then this travelled all the way
arrived at around 5 o'clock from somewhere called Belgaum
Under six thirty was program
So there were dressed up men
And what a comparing they did.
They said, we were ashamed –
We used to think that we Maharashtrians are very good at music
Very Good At Talas and this

The way these foreigners sang our music so well
…we cannot sing like them
Their Music…

..and WE were all

And the appreciation was so great that I myself was embarrassed
by how they were saying,
How it has happened to these people?
What is their guru have done and what did he do
for those who can sing so well.
So there's an appreciation
We have a tape of this

It's very interesting
They appreciated my children
The way in which we sang

there.
The way the were appreciating as if they were appreciating children singing something
great!
You see?
In this report was of a very sweet part of Vatsalya is feeling motherliness – look

It's happened with – many people have seen when some artists came, as you know that

They had the same feeling how could these children…
How can this people sing so well?
…How did I know it was over?
All of them beautiful feelings and all their appreciation created such a nice atmosphere

Instead of saying that oh what are these?
No good for music or nothing!
They've so much appreciated
That this people who have never known Indian music

So in the appreciation also
The fatherliness

That Vatsalya was here
An d a situation
Was s o beautiful

Yehudi Menuhin is a child before Him,

as we say in Hindi language samalna

and managing It

when supposing a tabla wala is sitting
an very senior musician is sitting, master sitting

Look up to Me always with very great feeling of a child
that you'll do after Me."

those who're younger than us
Those were not so well off
or they weren't much talented

and you can say as a motherly manor

But basically what He thinks
He is my progeny, I am developing Him.

Have Got A Talent

You must come up
he is a continuation of My Own Self
so This idea

do what like stand on your legs." No!
Life is a continuous basis

You're connected completely
We cannot understand collectivity
Of Innocence

I am very happy that a child of somebody is in the lap

So this breaks The feeling

This is Mine

feeling that we are now a means, a means you can say an instrument – a media by which

Are nothing but the principle of Shri Ganesh is Omkara and when it

that feeling-it

giving all powers to The Child
bringing up loving of The Child
understanding the limitations Of A Child
looking after All That
or The Sweetness

how look after beautiful thing
,how manage beautiful relationships.

Today I want to tell you something very important about this All-Pervading Power we have heard
of.
These are nothing but vibrations, spermatism is nothing but vibrations where all identities

This Is The Only Thing out of which everything comes
And Remains In Itself like We Can Say That
The sun's rays come out and then they try to create chlorophyll.
So it is not that we cannot compare Sun with that or you can say from the ocean,

Everything is inside them!
This Paramchaitanya has got everything inside this so we can say

Is Nothing But Truth

Then you become ignorant but there is nothing like ignorance. It doesn't exist
it does not exist

Doesn' t exist

doesn't exist, but what happens that the folds of this ocean into

You're made by Paramchaitanya all

Thing Is we Are sometimes Lost In The Fools

This awareness has to come that
We Are part and parcel Of That Paramchaitanya
The whole thing Is called as Chidvilasa
is the, will ask. Is the playful enjoyment of God's attention? Now you'll say how

Now you can ask Water alright dissolve this
Do This ,Do That

In

Understanding
In

Everywhere
There

Mother

So

ah..
